description: Geneea provides natural language processing services, including a general-purpose NLU API, media-focused semantic analysis, and a retrieval-augmented generation service for article search and research. Its products are aimed at analyzing text content and supporting newsroom workflows.
summary: Geneea exposes three documented HTTP APIs: the General NLP API (with a published OpenAPI spec), the Media API, and the RAG Service API; all require a Geneea-issued API key. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
